figures.caption: Figure 1. Evaluation of gene discovery methods on simulated traits. F1 score, precision, and recall 86 metrics for 100 simulated traits per task (‘easy’, ‘moderate’, or ‘challenging’). Metrics are reported for a 87 generalized linear mixed model (GLMM), an existing knock-offs-based method (SNPknock), and two 88 versions of our GDIP algorithm. 89
